revision_summary: Three targeted fixes required: (1) SCHEMA MISUSE — cherry_pick_moments[0] cites call_shape.required_beats as the authority for the voicemail-protocol failure. That section covers live-call structural beats, not no-answer handling. Revise the codex_reference to null or explicitly note this is a schema gap (no voicemail template exists in the schema), which is itself a coaching finding. (2) WEAK REASONING — cherry_pick_moments[0] stewart_read asserts paid-lead consequences without lead-type metadata. Remove or hedge the paid-lead framing; the coaching point (leave a message or the touch is wasted) is valid for any lead type and doesn't need the paid-lead qualifier to land. (3) MISSED MOMENT — add the 01:48 'No. I'm trying to say.' utterance to cherry_pick_moments as the closing beat of the open-line coaching clip, completing the artifact Stage 3 recommends playing in sequence. No fabricated quotes, no flipped hypotheses, no critical tone issues. One minor tone softening in trajectory_verdict.summary is recommended but not blocking.
